General.Name: Luoyang Glass Co Ltd
General.Description: Triumph New Energy Company Limited engages in research and development, manufacturing, and sales of new energy materials. The company provides screen printed glass, drilled tempered glass, ultra-clear and ultra-thin photovoltaic glass, rolled photovoltaic coated and tempered glass, rolled photovoltaic glass, original glass, tempered glass, AR coated glass, back glass, double glass component glass, and AR photovoltaic coated glass. Triumph New Energy Company Limited was formerly known as Luoyang Glass Company Limited and changed its name to Triumph New Energy Company Limited in March 2023. Triumph New Energy Company Limited was founded in 1956 and is based in Luoyang, China.
General.Address: No. 9 Tanggong Middle Road, Luoyang, China, 471009
